# Adrian Oliver

> Full-stack developer specializing in Next.js 15, TypeScript, and Supabase.
> Building production-ready e-commerce platforms and business web applications
> for US and EU remote clients. Async-first. GMT-4 timezone.

## Services

- E-Commerce Architecture: full-stack storefront systems, checkout flows,
  order management, WhatsApp Meta API and Resend notification pipelines
- Business Web Applications: POS systems, inventory management, RBAC dashboards,
  real-time data sync with Supabase
- Technical Consulting: architecture review, stack selection, system design

## Stack

- Framework: Next.js 15 App Router, React 19, TypeScript (strict)
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL, RLS, Realtime), raw SQL, RPC
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion (LazyMotion)
- APIs: Resend (transactional email), WhatsApp Meta API
- Deploy: Vercel (Edge, CI/CD)

## Production Work

- Lukess Home: https://adrianoliver.dev/work/lukess-home
  Full e-commerce platform. Next.js 15 + Supabase + WhatsApp checkout.
  Built solo in ~23 days. Live in production.

- Lukess Inventory: https://adrianoliver.dev/work/lukess-inventory
  Multi-role POS and inventory system. RBAC, real-time sync,
  multi-location support. Built solo. Live in production.

## Availability

Open to new remote projects. Async-first workflow.
Weekly milestones. GMT-4 timezone.
Contact: adrianoliver.dev@gmail.com
